3184670.name: Warpath
3184670.description:
Warpath brings us all back to the golden ages of first-person shooters. Boots on the ground, no abilities, no pay-to-win mechanics, just strictly gun play.

Weapon Customization

You will be able to customize your weapons to your liking. You will be able to change attachments and weapon skins. Attachments will be unlocked by default. A few weapon skins will be unlocked by default, along with more that you can obtain through leveling up and buying them with an in-game currency.

Kill Streaks

Warpath will feature 3 kill streaks. 3 kills get you a UAV, 7 kills get you an air strike, and 11 kills get you an attack chopper. For now, these will be the only kill streaks.

Game Modes

Free For All

Team Deathmatch

Kill Confirmed

Domination

Capture the Flag

Clans

I am very excited about this one. Clans will be a major focus in Warpath. You will be able to create a clan, customize the clan logo, and much more. You will also be able to compete in clan wars. Clan wars will run in seasons. Whatever clan is on top at the end of the season will receive custom items (emblems, calling cards, and weapon skins).
3184670.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
